data.title: Digital Dollar USA₮ Expands to Celo Network
data.description: The digital dollar USA₮, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, has officially expanded to the Celo network, marking its first supported network beyond Ethereum. According to PANews, the project has collaborated with Self and Google Cloud to launch a mainnet faucet, enabling the distribution of USA₮ to compliant users through privacy-protected human identity verification.

data.title: RootData Highlights Transparency in Crypto Market Makers
data.description:
RootData has initiated a series of events showcasing companies in the crypto industry, focusing on transparency as a key criterion. According to ChainCatcher, the second installment of this series highlights the crypto market maker sector, featuring nearly 40 companies that are still operational.

Leading the transparency rankings with scores above 70% are market makers such as Galaxy Digital, Wintermute, GSR, DWF Labs, Jane Street, and Amber Group. These companies are considered to be in the top tier of the sector. Conversely, 19 market maker projects scored below 60% in transparency, with many lacking disclosures on team details, funding, or market-making tokens, indicating room for improvement.

RootData's transparency scores are based on a comprehensive evaluation of factors such as investor background, team completeness, roadmap delivery, and media presence. A higher transparency score suggests greater project strength and stability.

data.title: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac Stocks Surge at Market Open
data.description: Fannie Mae's stock jumped 11% at the opening of the U.S. stock market, while Freddie Mac saw a 13% increase. According to Jin10, these significant gains reflect investor optimism in the housing finance sector. The surge comes amid broader market movements and could indicate a positive outlook for these government-sponsored enterprises. Analysts are closely watching these developments to assess their impact on the housing market and related financial sectors.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Chile's Copper Production Hits Nine-Year Low Amid Mining Challenges
data.description: Chile has reported its lowest monthly copper output in nearly nine years, underscoring the difficulties confronting the world's leading copper producer. Bloomberg posted on X that the decline is attributed to diminishing ore grades and underperformance at major mining sites. This development raises concerns about the future of copper production in Chile, a country that plays a crucial role in the global supply chain for this essential metal. The challenges faced by Chilean mines could have significant implications for the copper market, affecting prices and supply dynamics worldwide.

data.title: Precious metals and European stock indices rose in tandem, while crude oil bucked the trend and retreated.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,579.71 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.52%. Silver prices rose to $72.799 per ounce, a daily increase of 3.86%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 54.90, a daily increase of 1.82%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 73.20, a daily decrease of 1.61%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.19% to 6.90163. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.30% to 159.241. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 1.39% to 5,585.07 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 1.31% to 10,207.43 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 1.44% to 22,781.58 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 1.42% to $103.96 per barrel, while Brent crude oil fell 0.97% to $111.54 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Most crypto stocks rose at the open in the US market, with Circle (CRCL) gaining nearly 2%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 1.16%, the S&P 500 rose 1.10%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 1.30%. Most crypto stocks performed strongly, with Circle rising 1.99%, SharpLink rising 1.91%, Bitmine rising 1.58%, Coinbase rising 1.37%, and Strategy (MSTR) rising 1.34%; while Solana performed relatively weakly, falling 2.15%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: CertiK Report: OpenClaw Security Issues Retrospective, Focusing on Systemic Risks and Protection Guidelines for AI Agents
data.description: On March 31, Web3 security company CertiK released the "OpenClaw Security Report," which systematically reviews and analyzes the security boundaries and risk patterns that have emerged during the development of OpenClaw, and proposes protection recommendations for developers and users. The report points out that OpenClaw's architecture connects external input with a local high-privilege execution environment. This "strong capability + high privilege" design, while improving automation, also places higher demands on security: its early security model based on a "local trusted environment" has gradually exposed its limitations in complex deployment scenarios. Data shows that between November 2025 and March 2026, OpenClaw generated over 280 GitHub security bulletins and more than 100 CVE vulnerabilities. The study summarizes typical risk types and their causes from multiple levels, including gateway control, identity binding, execution mechanisms, and the plugin ecosystem. Building on this foundation, the report offers key recommendations for developers and users: Developers should establish threat models early on, incorporating access control, sandbox isolation, and permission inheritance mechanisms into their core design; they should also strengthen the validation and constraints on plugins and external inputs. Users, on the other hand, should avoid public network exposure, implement the principle of least privilege, and continuously conduct configuration audits and environment isolation management to reduce the risk of system abuse or misuse.

data.title: Singapore Court Orders Crypto Figures to Cease Defamatory Claims in DeFi Dispute
data.description:
A Singapore court has issued an order prohibiting two individuals in the cryptocurrency industry from making threatening or defamatory statements against a contributor linked to Curve Finance. According to Cointelegraph, the Protection from Harassment Court in Singapore has barred Wang Lei, founder of crypto wallet OneKey, and the user behind the X account "web3feng" from posting allegations of fraud or spreading false information about Wang Haoming, identified in court documents as the Curve contributor known as "Haowi Wong" on X.

This legal action follows accusations that surfaced after a decentralized finance exploit in June 2025 involving the stablecoin protocol Resupply, which resulted in approximately $9.6 million in losses. The court's decision mandates that the respondents refrain from making threatening, abusive, or insulting communications and requires them to pay a total of 2,500 Singapore dollars (about $1,900) in compensation and costs by April 7.

Curve Finance commented to Cointelegraph that disputes within the crypto sector can blur the line between legitimate criticism and defamation, emphasizing that false claims can damage trust and harm ecosystem participants. Neither Wang Lei nor the user behind @web3feng responded to requests for comment.

The Resupply exploit, confirmed in June 2025, involved a price manipulation vulnerability in its wstUSR market, allowing an attacker to siphon millions of dollars from the protocol. This incident attracted significant attention within the DeFi sector, with some associating the exploit with Curve-related infrastructure due to the use of cvcrvUSD and vault integrations. However, Curve founder Michael Egorov clarified that no Curve personnel were involved in the project.

Wang Haoming, a member of the Curve community, stated to Cointelegraph that the situation escalated following the exploit, leading to ongoing attacks and serious allegations from Wang Lei and the user behind "web3feng." He highlighted the importance of trust in the industry and the real consequences of spreading misinformation.

data.title: Resolv Co-Founder Updates on Ongoing Investigation
data.description: Resolv's co-founder, Ivan, has released a video statement regarding the ongoing investigation into recent events. According to Foresight News, Ivan noted that there is currently no evidence implicating internal personnel in the incident. The complete recovery plan has yet to be finalized.

data.title: AI TRENDS | CertiK Warns of Security Risks with OpenClaw Plugins
data.description: CertiK has issued a warning regarding the potential security risks associated with malicious skill plugins on the AI agent platform OpenClaw. According to NS3.AI, these plugins have the capability to steal authentication information from browser wallets, such as MetaMask and Phantom. CertiK has advised users, particularly those who are not experts, to refrain from installing OpenClaw until a version with verified security measures is available.

data.title: Diplomatic Efforts with Iran Strengthen Amid Military Pressure
data.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced that diplomatic negotiations aimed at resolving the conflict with Iran are gaining momentum. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Hegseth's remarks on the importance of maintaining military pressure to encourage Tehran to reach an agreement. The U.S. military continues to play a crucial role in applying this pressure, as diplomatic efforts intensify to achieve a peaceful resolution.

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfer from Ethena to Cumberland
data.description: At 20:51, a substantial transfer of 4,000 ETH was made from Ethena to Cumberland. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction involved Ethereum valued at approximately $8.19 million. The movement of such a large amount of cryptocurrency is noteworthy in the digital asset market.

data.title: Trump says he will not give up pressuring Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: In an interview with CBS News, Trump stated that he is "not ready" to abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. A CBS reporter called Trump Tuesday morning to request clarification on his earlier remarks suggesting a possible abandonment of the operation. Trump reiterated his dissatisfaction with other countries not sending military forces to participate in the US-Israel military action against Iran, but said he was not yet prepared to withdraw the US from the conflict. "At some point I will do that, but not now. Other countries have to get involved and handle it themselves. Iran has been weakened, but they have to do the work themselves." Trump also reiterated that although Iran continues to strike ships and infrastructure in Gulf states, there is "no real threat" to the Strait of Hormuz. "Let them fight for it themselves. They don't want to help anyone. NATO is bad, they're all bad. So if they want oil, they'll go get it themselves," Trump said. (Jin Shi)

data.title: China and Pakistan put forward a five-point initiative on restoring peace and stability in the Gulf and the Middle East.
data.description: Wang Yi, member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister, held talks with Pakistani Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Dar in Beijing. The two sides exchanged views on the situation in the Gulf and the Middle East and put forward the following initiatives: 1. Immediate cessation of hostilities; 2. Early commencement of peace talks; 3. Ensuring the security of non-military targets; 4. Ensuring the safety of shipping lanes; 5. Ensuring the primacy of the UN Charter. (Xinhua)

data.title: Israel Plans to Control Southern Lebanon Amid Hezbollah Conflict
data.description: Israel announced its intention to seize control of significant areas in southern Lebanon, aiming to prevent over 600,000 residents from returning to their homes. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this move as part of Israel's ongoing campaign against the militant group Hezbollah. The decision marks a significant escalation in the conflict, reflecting Israel's strategic approach to counter Hezbollah's influence in the region. The situation continues to develop, with potential implications for regional stability and international relations.

data.title: Cape Town Aims to Become Business-Processing Hub Similar to India
data.description: Cape Town is positioning itself as a potential business-processing hub, drawing comparisons to India's established industry. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the city's strategic efforts to attract international companies seeking cost-effective solutions for business operations. The South African city is leveraging its skilled workforce and favorable time zone to appeal to global firms. Local authorities are optimistic about Cape Town's potential to replicate India's success in the business-processing sector, aiming to boost economic growth and create job opportunities. The initiative is part of a broader strategy to enhance the city's economic profile and competitiveness on the global stage.

data.title: Chainalysis to Introduce AI Agents for Enhanced Blockchain Investigations
data.description: Chainalysis is set to integrate natural-language AI agents into its blockchain investigation platform, Reactor. According to NS3.AI, this new tool will leverage data from approximately 10 million previous investigations. Jonathan Levin, a representative from Chainalysis, stated that the AI agents are expected to be launched over the summer. These agents aim to enable non-technical users to create customized investigations while maintaining audit trails and adhering to standards of evidence.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Coreweave Shares Rise 5.6% Pre-Market After Securing $8.5 Billion Loan
data.description: Coreweave's stock experienced a 5.6% increase in pre-market trading following the announcement of an $8.5 billion loan to expand its artificial intelligence infrastructure. According to Jin10, this financial boost is expected to significantly enhance Coreweave's capabilities in the AI sector, positioning the company for further growth and development in the rapidly evolving industry. The loan will be utilized to bolster Coreweave's infrastructure, enabling it to meet the increasing demand for AI solutions.

data.title: Bitcoin Speculation Revived as Elon Musk and Donald Trump Comment on Crypto
data.description: Elon Musk recently shared a bitcoin-themed animation on X, sparking renewed interest in the cryptocurrency. According to NS3.AI, U.S. President Donald Trump remarked that crypto is becoming "powerful," further fueling speculation around bitcoin's future. Musk announced that X Money will be accessible to the public next month, while Tesla maintains its position by holding approximately 10,000 bitcoin.

data.title: US Defense Secretary: The goal is to destroy Iranian missiles, drones, and the navy; securing the open Strait of Hormuz was not listed as a military objective.
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Hergsays stated that the Pentagon's goal is to destroy Iran's missiles, drones, and navy. He did not list securing the Strait of Hormuz as a military objective, saying it was the task of other countries. Hergsays said, "The Strait of Hormuz issue...is not just an American issue." This statement echoed calls from President Trump, who has urged other countries to address the strategic waterway blocked by Iran. Hergsays stated that a "top priority" is reaching an agreement with Iran, but he did not specify what such an agreement would include. (Jinshi)
